title: Witness a Blob of Death
description: Skipping a first-layer check lets a failed Z homing extrude in mid-air, engulfing the nozzle in molten plastic.

dialogue.text: Sydney here. You skip the first-layer check, the Z axis mis-homes, and molten PLA begins wrapping the hotend. Goggles on, stay clear of moving axes, and keep a fire extinguisher within reach.

options.text: Let it run and document the failure.
Kill power, let the blob cool, and list the damage.

dialogue.text: Unplug the printer, wait for the hotend to reach room temp, then move the gantry by hand to confirm it's free. Lay out goggles, pliers, a spare nozzle, and paper towels.

options.text: Peel away plastic, swap the nozzle, re-seat wiring.

dialogue.text: Blob removed, new nozzle installed. Next time, stay for the first layer, check Z offset, and keep the bed clean so you don't repeat the mess.
